title: Kerala Backwaters Bliss
shortDescription: Houseboats, hill stations, and spice gardens in God's own country.
overview: Glide through palm-lined backwaters on a private houseboat, climb mist-wrapped tea plantations in Munnar, and discover the colonial soul of Fort Kochi. This 7-day escape balances slow water days with lush highland mornings.

itinerary.title: Arrive Kochi
itinerary.description: Welcome at airport, leisure evening at Marine Drive.

itinerary.title: Fort Kochi Tour
itinerary.description: St. Francis Church, Jewish Synagogue, Kathakali show in evening.

itinerary.title: Drive to Munnar
itinerary.description: Scenic drive via Cheeyappara waterfalls. Tea museum visit.

itinerary.title: Munnar Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Eravikulam Park, Mattupetty Dam, Echo Point.

itinerary.title: Munnar to Alleppey
itinerary.description: Board houseboat by noon, cruise the backwaters.

itinerary.title: Alleppey to Kochi
itinerary.description: Disembark, return to Kochi for shopping at Lulu Mall.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to airport with sweet memories.

termsNote: This is a standard itinerary shared to give you a clear overview of the tour flow and possible experiences. After your preferences, requirements, and customizations are discussed, a final booking confirmation will be issued with all details clearly outlined.

paymentPolicy: A minimum 30% advance payment is required to confirm all bookings.
Full payment must be completed at least 7 days before departure.
All flight and houseboat bookings require full upfront payment.
hotelPolicy: Houseboat boarding is at 12:00 PM and disembarkation by 9:00 AM the next day.
Room category upgrades are subject to availability.
transportationPolicy: Private AC vehicle is provided per the itinerary.
Vehicle is not at disposal; extra usage will be billed separately.
cancellationPolicy: 30+ days before departure: full refund minus processing fees.
childPolicy: Children below 4 years travel free (no extra bed).
Children 5-11 charged at child rate without extra bed.
